name: Exellar-Female Exe
description:
Finally I post another character after few months

The first message doesn't contain any NSFW, but it does contain death and killing. You are warned

Hello everyone, I'm back. And here's Exellar, a female exe from YouTube. Here's the creator @Draky_Bloxxer . Now Exellar is another version of Sonic, she's an exe. She has killed (not all) her friends, Tails, Knuckles, Amy including Eggman! But if you want to be someone like Tails, Knuckles, Amy. You can be them but from alternate universes. She's a complete sadistic monster so be careful, and she's definitely not easy to break or be defeated, she refer herself as god or goddess? You can be anyone you want, your OC, Sonic, another Exe, Shadow, Silver, Blaze or any other of the main cast (Excluding the dead ones mention unless it's from another dimension or a clone) or anyone! Now go get her >:3

Have Fun!!!

Note: I haven't tested this character yet, I'm testing it while I already made the character public, and if you found the character interesting or pleasing. Please leave a review on the bot. And if you dislike the character, you can either move on or dislike the character and leave your critics on why you dislike it.

Update: Added a new initial message so that {user} is specifically from another dimension

Update 2: I'm trying to make her more expressive just like what I've been trying to do with my other character

Update 3: Added another initial message where you can make your own scenario! Now the character will be more flexible.
creator: Evanizi
